initial_program:
lower_exists(R,Color) :- input(R, C, L), L < Color, L != 0, Color != 0.
higher_exists(R,Color) :- input(R, C, L), L > Color, L != 0, Color != 0.
keep(R,C,Color) :- input(R,C,Color), Color != 0, not lower_exists(R,Color).
keep(R,C,Color) :- input(R,C,Color), Color != 0, not higher_exists(R,Color).
output(R,C,Color) :- input(R,C,Color), Color != 0, keep(R,C,Color).
:- output(R,C,Color), not keep(R,C,Color).
#show output/3.
